title: multiple active result sets
text: multiple active result sets Specify whether the application is allowed to perform multiple operations on a single connection. USYS$MSS_PARAMS = multiple active result sets : on | off USYS$MSS_PARAMS = mars : on | off Description Specify whether the application is allowed to perform multiple operations on a single connection even if there are still default sets open on the connection.
